title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself poses minimal direct risk, but its widespread adoption could lead to misuse or exploitation if the tool contains flaws or is improperly configured. Additionally, reliance on automated tools without proper validation may result in overlooked vulnerabilities.
recommended_actions: Conduct a thorough code review of the tool before deploying it in production environments.
Complement the tool's findings with manual security assessments to ensure comprehensive coverage.
Monitor the tool's updates and community feedback for potential vulnerabilities or improvements.

title: Bludit is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) in its page creating functionality. An...
description: Bludit is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) in its page creating functionality. An authenticated attacker with page creation privileges (such as Author, Editor, or Administrator) can embed a malicious JavaScript payload in the tags field of a newly created article. This payload will be executed when a victim visits the URL of the uploaded resource. The uploaded resource itself is accessible without authentication. Critically, this vulnerability could be used to automatically create

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This vulnerability allows an attacker to execute malicious JavaScript code, potentially leading to session hijacking, data theft, or unauthorized actions within the application. Since the uploaded resource is accessible without authentication, the attack surface is widened, increasing the risk of exploitation.
recommended_actions: Update Bludit to the latest version if a patch is available for CVE-2026-4420.
Implement input validation and sanitization for user-generated content, especially in the tags field.
Restrict access to uploaded resources by requiring authentication or implementing access control mechanisms.

title: Tinyproxy through 1.11.3 is vulnerable to HTTP request parsing desynchronization due to a case...
description: Tinyproxy through 1.11.3 is vulnerable to HTTP request parsing desynchronization due to a case-sensitive comparison of the Transfer-Encoding header in src/reqs.c. The is_chunked_transfer() function uses strcmp() to compare the header value against "chunked", even though RFC 7230 specifies that transfer-coding names are case-insensitive. By sending a request with Transfer-Encoding: Chunked, an unauthenticated remote attacker can cause Tinyproxy to misinterpret the request as having no body. In th

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-31842.

description: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Analytify Simple Social Media Share Buttons allows Cross Site Request Forgery.This issue affects Simple Social Media Share Buttons: from n/a through 6.2.0.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-34904.

title: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Analytify Under Construction, Coming Soon &...
description: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Analytify Under Construction, Coming Soon & Maintenance Mode allows Cross Site Request Forgery.This issue affects Under Construction, Coming Soon & Maintenance Mode: from n/a through 2.1.1.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The CSRF vulnerability in the Analytify Under Construction, Coming Soon & Maintenance Mode plugin could allow attackers to perform unauthorized actions on behalf of authenticated users. This could lead to unauthorized changes in website settings, defacement, or further exploitation of the system.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the plugin to the latest patched version if available. If no patch is available, temporarily disable the plugin.
Implement CSRF protection mechanisms, such as using anti-CSRF tokens, in all web applications.
Review and monitor logs for any suspicious activity or unauthorized changes to website settings.

title: Improper validation and restriction of a classpath path name vulnerability in Apache ActiveMQ...
description:
Improper validation and restriction of a classpath path name vulnerability in Apache ActiveMQ Client, Apache ActiveMQ Broker, Apache ActiveMQ All.

In two instances (when creating a Stomp consumer and also browsing messages in the Web console) an authenticated user provided "key" value could be constructed to traverse the classpath due to path concatenation. As a result, the application is exposed to a classpath path resource loading vulnerability that could potentially be chained together with

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This vulnerability allows an authenticated user to exploit improper classpath validation, potentially leading to arbitrary resource loading or code execution. If chained with other vulnerabilities, it could result in severe compromise of the application and underlying systems.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Apache ActiveMQ to the latest patched version once available.
Restrict access to the Web console and Stomp consumer functionalities to trusted users only.
Implement strict input validation and sanitization for user-provided 'key' values to prevent path traversal.

title: Missing Authorization vulnerability in OceanWP Ocean Extra allows Exploiting Incorrectly...

title: The Booking for Appointments and Events Calendar – Amelia plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to...
description: The Booking for Appointments and Events Calendar – Amelia plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Insecure Direct Object Reference in all versions up to, and including, 2.1.3. This is due to the `UpdateProviderCommandHandler` failing to validate changes to the `externalId` field when a Provider (Employee) user updates their own profile. The `externalId` maps directly to a WordPress user ID and is passed to `wp_set_password()` and `wp_update_user()` without authorization checks. This makes it possi

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5465.

title: The Popup Box  WordPress plugin before 5.5.0 does not properly validate nonces in the...
description: The Popup Box  WordPress plugin before 5.5.0 does not properly validate nonces in the add_or_edit_popupbox() function before saving popup data, allowing unauthenticated attackers to perform Cross-Site Request Forgery attacks. When an authenticated admin visits a malicious page, the attacker can create or modify popups with arbitrary JavaScript that executes in the admin panel and frontend.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2025-15611.

title: Improper Input Validation, Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')...
description:
Improper Input Validation, Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability in Apache ActiveMQ Broker, Apache ActiveMQ.

Apache ActiveMQ Classic exposes the Jolokia JMX-HTTP bridge at /api/jolokia/ on the web console. The default Jolokia access policy permits exec operations on all ActiveMQ MBeans (org.apache.activemq:*), including
BrokerService.addNetworkConnector(String) and BrokerService.addConnector(String). 

An authenticated attacker can invoke these operations with

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This vulnerability allows an authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code on the Apache ActiveMQ Broker via the Jolokia JMX-HTTP bridge. Exploitation could lead to unauthorized access, system compromise, and potential lateral movement within the network.
recommended_actions: Restrict access to the Jolokia JMX-HTTP bridge by implementing strict network access controls and limiting access to trusted IPs.
Apply the latest security patches and updates from Apache ActiveMQ to address the CVE-2026-34197 vulnerability.
Disable or restrict the Jolokia JMX-HTTP bridge if it is not required, or configure a more restrictive Jolokia access policy to limit operations.

title: The SQL Chart Builder WordPress plugin before 2.3.8 does not properly escape user input as it is...
description: The SQL Chart Builder WordPress plugin before 2.3.8 does not properly escape user input as it is concatened to SQL queries, making it possible for attackers to conduct SQL Injection attacks against the dynamic filter functionality.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4079.

title: The Charitable – Donation Plugin for WordPress – Fundraising with Recurring Donations & More...
description: The Charitable – Donation Plugin for WordPress – Fundraising with Recurring Donations & More plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity in versions up to, and including, 1.8.9.7. This is due to missing cryptographic verification of incoming Stripe webhook events. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to forge payment_intent.succeeded webhook payloads and mark pending donations as completed without a real payment.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to forge Stripe webhook payloads, potentially marking pending donations as completed without actual payments. This can lead to financial losses, fraudulent transactions, and reputational damage for organizations relying on the plugin.
recommended_actions: Update the Charitable plugin to the latest version as soon as a patch addressing this vulnerability is released.
Implement server-side validation for incoming Stripe webhook events using cryptographic verification to ensure authenticity.
Monitor donation transactions for anomalies and enable logging to detect potential exploitation attempts.

description: The Link Whisper Free WordPress plugin before 0.9.1 has a publicly accessible REST endpoint that allows unauthenticated settings updates.

title: In parisneo/lollms version 2.1.0, the application's session management is vulnerable to improper...
description: In parisneo/lollms version 2.1.0, the application's session management is vulnerable to improper access control due to the use of a weak secret key for signing JSON Web Tokens (JWT). This vulnerability allows an attacker to perform an offline brute-force attack to recover the secret key. Once the secret key is obtained, the attacker can forge administrative tokens by modifying the JWT payload and resigning it with the cracked secret. This enables unauthorized users to escalate privileges, impers

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1114.

title: A vulnerability in the HuggingFace Transformers library, specifically in the `Trainer` class,...
description: A vulnerability in the HuggingFace Transformers library, specifically in the `Trainer` class, allows for arbitrary code execution. The `_load_rng_state()` method in `src/transformers/trainer.py` at line 3059 calls `torch.load()` without the `weights_only=True` parameter. This issue affects all versions of the library supporting `torch>=2.2` when used with PyTorch versions below 2.6, as the `safe_globals()` context manager provides no protection in these versions. An attacker can exploit this vul

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1839.

title: The Ninja Forms - File Uploads plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary file uploads due...
description: The Ninja Forms - File Uploads plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary file uploads due to missing file type validation in the 'NF_FU_AJAX_Controllers_Uploads::handle_upload' function in all versions up to, and including, 3.3.26. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to upload arbitrary files on the affected site's server which may make remote code execution possible. Note: The vulnerability was partially patched in version 3.3.25 and fully patched in version 3.3.27.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-0740.

title: In Modem, there is a possible system crash due to a logic error. This could lead to remote denial...
description: In Modem, there is a possible system crash due to a logic error. This could lead to remote denial of service, if a UE has connected to a rogue base station controlled by the attacker, with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation. Patch ID: MOLY01106496; Issue ID: MSV-4467.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-20431.

title: In sec boot, there is a possible out of bounds write due to an integer overflow. This could lead...
description: In sec boot, there is a possible out of bounds write due to an integer overflow. This could lead to local denial of service, if an attacker has physical access to the device, with User execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation. Patch ID: ALPS09963054; Issue ID: MSV-3899.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows for a possible out-of-bounds write due to an integer overflow in the secure boot process. This could result in a local denial of service, potentially rendering the device inoperable if exploited. Physical access and user execution privileges are required, limiting the scope of exploitation.
recommended_actions: Apply the patch provided by the vendor (Patch ID: ALPS09963054) as soon as it becomes available.
Restrict physical access to devices to authorized personnel only to mitigate exploitation risk.
Perform a security audit of devices using secure boot to identify other potential vulnerabilities.

title: CVE-2026-4020 - The Gravity SMTP plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all version
description: The Gravity SMTP plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all versions up to, and including, 2.1.4. This is due to a REST API endpoint registered at /wp-json/gravitysmtp/v1/tests/mock-data with a permission_callback that unconditionally returns true, allowing any unauthenticated visitor to access it. When the ?page=gravitysmtp-settings query parameter is appended, the plugin's register_connector_data() method populates internal connector data, causing the endpoint to return approximately 365 KB of JSON containing the full System Report. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to retrieve detailed system configuration data including PHP version, loaded extensions, web server version, document root path, database server type and version, WordPress version, all active plugins with versions, active theme, WordPress configuration details, database table names, and any API keys/tokens configured in the plugin.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4020.

title: CVE-2026-3300 - The Everest Forms Pro plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Remote Code Execution via PHP Code Injec
description: The Everest Forms Pro plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Remote Code Execution via PHP Code Injection in all versions up to, and including, 1.9.12. This is due to the Calculation Addon's process_filter() function concatenating user-submitted form field values into a PHP code string without proper escaping before passing it to eval(). The sanitize_text_field() function applied to input does not escape single quotes or other PHP code context characters. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject and execute arbitrary PHP code on the server by submitting a crafted value in any string-type form field (text, email, URL, select, radio) when a form uses the "Complex Calculation" feature.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code on the server, potentially leading to full system compromise, data exfiltration, website defacement, or further exploitation of the underlying infrastructure.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Everest Forms Pro plugin to a patched version (if available) or disable the plugin until a fix is released.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to block malicious payloads targeting this vulnerability.
Conduct a thorough review of server logs to identify any signs of exploitation and, if detected, perform a full incident response investigation.

title: CVE-2026-5115 - The PaperCut NG/MF (specifically, the embedded application for Konica Minolta devices) is vulnerable
description:
The PaperCut NG/MF (specifically, the embedded application for Konica Minolta devices) is vulnerable to session hijacking. The PaperCut NG/MF Embedded application is a software interface that runs directly on the touch screen of a multi-function device.

It was internally discovered that the communication channel between the embedded application and the server was insecure, which could leak data including sensitive information that may be used to mount an  attack on the device. Such an attack could potentially be used to steal data or to perform a phishing attack on the end user.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5115.

title: CVE-2026-4794 - Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in PaperCut NG/MF before 25.0.10 allow authentic
description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in PaperCut NG/MF before 25.0.10 allow authenticated administrator users to inject arbitrary web script or HTML code via different UI fields. This could be used to compromise other admininistrator's sessions or perform unauthorized actions via the administrator's authenticated context (e.g. requires an active login session).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4794.

title: CVE-2026-30940 - baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, a path traversal vulnerability
description: baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, a path traversal vulnerability exists in the theme file management API (/baser/api/admin/bc-theme-file/theme_files/add.json) that allows arbitrary file write. An authenticated administrator can include ../ sequences in the path parameter to create a PHP file in an arbitrary directory outside the theme directory, which may result in remote code execution (RCE). This issue has been patched in version 5.2.3.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-30940.

title: CVE-2026-30877 - baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, there is an OS command injectio
description: baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, there is an OS command injection vulnerability in the update functionality. title: CVE-2026-21861 - baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, baserCMS contains an OS command
description: baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, baserCMS contains an OS command injection vulnerability in the core update functionality. An authenticated administrator can execute arbitrary OS commands on the server due to improper handling of user-controlled input that is directly passed to exec() without sufficient validation or escaping. This issue has been patched in version 5.2.3.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-21861.

title: CVE-2025-32957 - baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, the application's restore funct
description: baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, the application's restore function allows users to upload a .zip file, which is then automatically extracted. A PHP file inside the archive is included using require_once without validating or restricting the filename. An attacker can craft a malicious PHP file within the zip and achieve arbitrary code execution when it is included. This issue has been patched in version 5.2.3.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2025-32957.

title: CVE-2026-5157 - A vulnerability was identified in code-projects Online Food Ordering System 1.0. Affected is an unkn
description: A vulnerability was identified in code-projects Online Food Ordering System 1.0. Affected is an unknown function of the file /form/order.php of the component Order Module. Such manipulation of the argument cust_id leads to cross site scripting. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit is publicly available and might be used.

title: CVE-2026-5156 - A vulnerability was determined in Tenda CH22 1.0.0.1. This impacts the function formQuickIndex of th
description: A vulnerability was determined in Tenda CH22 1.0.0.1. This impacts the function formQuickIndex of the file /goform/QuickIndex of the component Parameter Handler. This manipulation of the argument mit_linktype causes stack-based buffer overflow. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized.
